titleStmt.title: SII 19.399: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 399. (A.R. No. 7 of 1920.) TIRUMAḺAVĀḌI, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VAIDYANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is an infinished inscription. It records the gift of a copper image of Koḷgaidēvar with bronze pedestal for receiving the s11rībali offering, and a silver tray for betel offering in the temple of Tirumaḻavāḍi-Uḍaiyār by Āchchaṉ Dūrjati (a resident) of Gaṇḍarāditta-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. This may be a record of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 16Āvatu poykaināṭṭu tevatāṉam tirumaḻavāṭi Āḻvārkku śrīkaṇṭarātittaccaturvedimaṅkalattu cāliyan Āccan tūṟcaṭi śrīpali Eḻun=taruḷa vaitta koḷkai cepputtirumeni niṟai Irupattaimpa�m cen=tarā pātapiṭam niṟai Eṇpatinpalamum Ittevarkku Abhi
ṣekam ceyta veḷḷi niṟai muppattu mukkaḻañcu Aṭaikkāyyamutu ceya vaitta Ilaikkum veṇkalattalai niṟai Irupatin palamum Aṭitarā niṟai Irupatinpalamum ne
Digital edition of SII 19.399 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
